use_cases: Displaying order confirmation details after successful purchase completion
Providing transaction success feedback with order summary
Serving as a post-checkout confirmation screen in e-commerce applications
ai_summary: A card component designed to display order confirmation details after a successful transaction. Built with shadcn/ui patterns using Radix primitives and Tailwind CSS for styling. Features a clean, minimal aesthetic with standard interactive states for included action buttons. Typically used in e-commerce checkout flows to reassure customers of successful orders.
